summary: Final deterministic proof queue bundle for runtime-change improvement guardrails, scenario proposal attention views, selected durable evidence, claim-discovery prepared/open-gap state, and Cautilus Agent source-launcher plus claim-review ownership guidance.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the eight listed claims are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Full Cautilus Agent claim-discovery curation has passed a completed live dogfood verdict.
LLM-backed claim review correctness is proven by deterministic tests.
A passing simplification proposal is trusted without the normal tests and review gates.
Human-facing attention views replace canonical full ranked scenario proposal packets.
The installed machine `cautilus` binary is stale on this host.

protectedBehaviors: scenario propose preserves the full ranked proposals list
scenario propose derives a bounded attentionView without hiding full results from agents
standalone scenario proposal packets remain schema-versioned
improve prepare/propose/build-artifact emits durable schema-versioned packets
a skill/eval summary can preserve a passing recommendation while reporting model_runtime_changed
runtime-change simplification proposals remain proposals that require normal follow-up gates
report packets normalize comparable runtime fingerprints
scenario proposal HTML renders attention views while preserving canonical proposal packet semantics
scenario proposal output schema matches the generated proposal packet
improve flow keeps bounded input, proposal, and revision artifacts
Cautilus Agent curation flow audit requires false-positive and false-negative curation and stops before review/eval overrun
Cautilus Agent reviewer launch flow requires selected review budget, user confirmation, one reviewer lane, and stop-before-apply boundaries
repo shim forwards --version to the Go CLI entry
repo shim preserves caller cwd while resolving doctor against a consumer repo
repo shim keeps lifecycle install working from a consumer repo
packaged cautilus-agent skill stays in sync with the repo-Cautilus Agent source

commandEvidence.command: sh -lc 'CAUTILUS_BIN=cautilus; if [ -x ./bin/cautilus ]; then CAUTILUS_BIN=./bin/cautilus; fi; printf "resolved=%s\n" "$CAUTILUS_BIN"; "$CAUTILUS_BIN" --version'

node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); for (const p of ["docs/specs/evidence/gaps.spec.md",".cautilus/claims/evidence-user-claim-discovery-reviewable-artifacts-2026-05-17.json",".cautilus/claims/evidence-improve-artifact-runtime-fingerprint-2026-05-17.json",".cautilus/claims/evidence-ownership-evidence-gaps-improvement-2026-05-17.json"]) if (!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error(`missing ${p}`); console.log("selected-evidence-artifacts=present")'

decision.reason: The focused tests and artifact checks prove the remaining deterministic queue: runtime-change improvement proposals stay gated, active-run and selected evidence artifacts remain reopenable, scenario proposal attention views do not hide full ranked packets, claim-discovery curation and reviewer launch remain prepared/fixture-backed rather than completed live dogfood verdicts, and Cautilus Agent source/packaged guidance preserves source-launcher and claim-review ownership boundaries.
